description_long: This is a sleek, modern sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a coupe body style. The exterior is primarily silver-gray with two bold orange racing stripes running from the hood to the rear, accentuating its sporty character. The car features large, black, multi-spoke wheels and tinted windows, giving it an aggressive and high-performance appearance. The front end is characterized by a wide grille and sharp, angular headlights, while the rear showcases dual exhausts and a compact, streamlined trunk. Subtle sculpted lines along the sides and hood enhance its dynamic look. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, agility, and luxury, suitable for urban streets or upscale neighborhoods.
description: A silver-gray sports car with orange racing stripes, black multi-spoke wheels, and a low, aerodynamic coupe design. Features include tinted windows, a wide grille, and dual rear exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, angular headlights, and dual orange racing stripes running along the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coupe profile, sculpted door, and large black wheels with visible orange stripe detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tinted rear window, dual exhausts, and continuation of the orange stripes over the trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic lines, black wheels, and door contours.
